2.3 Rate all applicants individually based on their assessment results
2.4 Consolidate the ratings and prepare comparative assessment results matrix and Selection Line-up
2.5 Deliberate on the results of the comparative assessment and finalize the selection line-up for the appropriate action of the appointing authority
2.6 Prepare and sign the HRMPSB Resolution and Minutes
2.7 Transmit the selection line-up and the signed resolution and minutes to the appointing authority for formal selection.
2.9 Notify the applicants of the selection results

4.5 I-prepara at ihanda ang Terminal Report
